text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "---------- CONSULTATION regarding the request for: CARDIOLOGY EXAMINATION of: 02/PHONE_NUMBER:58 ---------- Consulting physician: Dr. Sara PERSONS_NAME on: 02/PHONE_NUMBER:58 72-year-old woman.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Cardiovascular risk factors: arterial hypertension, overweight Known chronic hyponatremia (the son is unable to provide details but reports constant hyponatremia during all hospital admissions, which has never been fully corrected).", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Hypothyroidism, on replacement therapy.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Unclear diagnosis of COPD or asthma but patient is on Foster therapy (never smoked).", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Family history of Brugada syndrome.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Previous cholecystectomy.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Steatotic hepatopathy.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Therapy: Lucen, Lasitone 1 tablet, Eutirox 75 mcg, Bisoprolol 1.25 mg, Xarelto 20 mg, domperidone before meals, Lorazepam 2.5 mg, En 5-10 drops/day, Foster Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation on NAO.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Electrical Cardioversion in 2019.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Previous coronary angiograms were performed for chest pain (sometimes during tachycardia in the course of AF/AFL): the first in 2007, then in 2019 at San Giovanni Battista Hospital and in 2020 at PLACE Pia that documented intact coronary arteries.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "In 2019 reported EF 52%, in 2020 reported EF 45% with apical and mid-segment hypokinesia.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Admitted to the Emergency Department for onset this night around 1:00 a.m. of oppressive chest pain associated with dyspnea and lipothymia while in bed (was awake) lasting about 40 min.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "Upon arrival in the Emergency Department, pain still present although reduced in intensity, BP 100/60 mmHg, ECG SR with HR 75 bpm, AFB, descending ST-segment elevation with biphasic T waves in the inferior and V1-V4 leads (not present on a previous ECG from approximately one month ago).", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "Administered natispray puff, with patient reporting good results.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "Blood chemistry tests: TnT negative in two consecutive tests, sodium 123.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_15] ("2026-01-01", "Chest X-ray normal.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_16] ("2026-01-01", "At the visit, the patient is alert, conscious, and cooperative.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_17] ("2026-01-01", "Currently asymptomatic.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_18] ("2026-01-01", "Normal physical examination.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_19] ("2026-01-01", "Serial ECGs last night and this morning show increased ST depression in the leads described above.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_20] ("2026-01-01", "Echocardiogram shows hypertrophic LV with EF of about 50% in the presence hypokinesia at the true apex, mild MR, non-dilated RV with normal contractility, aortic max v 1.3 m/sec, mild TI, no pericardial effusion, non-dilated collapsed IVC.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_21] ("2026-01-01", "CONCLUSIONS Chest pain and ECG abnormalities without enzymatic activity in the blood.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_22] ("2026-01-01", "In view of the symptom and ECG alterations, further assessment via coronary CT is recommended.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_23] ("2026-01-01", "--------------------", 0.0, 0.5)
